Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ConstraintDefinition

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ConstraintDefinition
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator
public static class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ConstraintDefinition extends Object implements Serializable
Definition of a model-level constraint.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • ConstraintDefinition

      public ConstraintDefinition()
      Default constructor for serialization frameworks.

    • ConstraintDefinition

      public ConstraintDefinition(String name, ToDoubleFunction<ProcessModel> evaluator, double lowerBound)
      Creates a lower-bound model constraint.
      Parameters:
      name - constraint name
      evaluator - model-level evaluator
      lowerBound - lower bound

    • ConstraintDefinition

      public ConstraintDefinition(String name, ToDoubleFunction<ProcessModel> evaluator, double lowerBound, double upperBound)
      Creates a range model constraint.
      Parameters:
      name - constraint name
      evaluator - model-level evaluator
      lowerBound - lower bound
      upperBound - upper bound

      Gets the lower bound or equality target.

      Gets the upper bound.
      Returns:
      upper bound

      upperBound - upper bound

      public double getEqualityTolerance()
      Gets the equality tolerance.
      Returns:
      equality tolerance

    • setEqualityTolerance

      public void setEqualityTolerance(double equalityTolerance)
      Sets the equality tolerance.
      Parameters:
      equalityTolerance - equality tolerance

    • getUnit

      public String getUnit()
      Gets the unit of measure.
      Returns:
      unit of measure

    • setUnit

      public void setUnit(String unit)
      Sets the unit of measure.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit of measure

    • isHard

      public boolean isHard()
      Checks whether this is a hard constraint.
      Returns:
      true when violations make the solution infeasible

    • setHard

      public void setHard(boolean hard)
      Sets whether this is a hard constraint.
      Parameters:
      hard - true when violations make the solution infeasible

    • getPenaltyWeight

      public double getPenaltyWeight()
      Gets the penalty weight.
      Returns:
      penalty weight

    • setPenaltyWeight

      public void setPenaltyWeight(double penaltyWeight)
      Sets the penalty weight.
      Parameters:
      penaltyWeight - penalty weight

    • getEvaluator

      public ToDoubleFunction<ProcessModel> getEvaluator()
      Gets the model-level evaluator.
      Returns:
      model-level evaluator

    • setEvaluator

      public void setEvaluator(ToDoubleFunction<ProcessModel> evaluator)
      Sets the model-level evaluator.
      Parameters:
      evaluator - model-level evaluator

    • isCapacityConstraint

      public boolean isCapacityConstraint()
      Checks whether this is an equipment capacity constraint.
      Returns:
      true when generated from a CapacityConstraint

    • getAreaName

      public String getAreaName()
      Gets the process area name for capacity constraints.
      Returns:
      process area name, or null for non-capacity constraints

    • getEquipmentName

      public String getEquipmentName()
      Gets the equipment name for capacity constraints.
      Returns:
      equipment name, or null for non-capacity constraints

    • getEquipmentConstraintName

      public String getEquipmentConstraintName()
      Gets the original equipment constraint name.
      Returns:
      equipment constraint name, or null for non-capacity constraints

    • getCapturedCapacityConstraint

      public CapacityConstraint getCapturedCapacityConstraint()
      Gets the captured equipment capacity constraint.
      Returns:
      captured capacity constraint, or null when unavailable after serialization

    • setCapacityMetadata

      public void setCapacityMetadata(String areaName, String equipmentName, String equipmentConstraintName, CapacityConstraint capacityConstraint)
      Marks this definition as an equipment capacity constraint.
      Parameters:
      areaName - process area name
      equipmentName - equipment name
      equipmentConstraintName - equipment constraint name
      capacityConstraint - captured capacity constraint

    • evaluate

      public double evaluate(ProcessModel model)
      Evaluates the constraint value.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      constraint value

    • margin

      public double margin(ProcessModel model)
      Computes the constraint margin.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      positive margin when satisfied and negative margin when violated

    • isSatisfied

      public boolean isSatisfied(ProcessModel model)
      Checks whether the constraint is satisfied.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      true when the margin is non-negative

    • penalty

      public double penalty(ProcessModel model)
      Computes the penalty for a constraint violation.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      zero when satisfied, otherwise a positive quadratic penalty

    • getSeverityLevel

      public ConstraintSeverityLevel getSeverityLevel()
      Gets the unified severity level.
      Returns:
      hard or soft severity level
